CustomField.description: Overrides the org-level rollup setting for this batch. Controls whether Opportunity rollups (donor statistics) are calculated immediately during batch processing or deferred to the nightly scheduled job. Enabling increases processing time.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to calculate donor rollups immediately during this batch's processing. Leave unchecked to defer rollups to the nightly scheduled job. May slow processing.
CustomField.label: Calculate Donation Rollups with Batch
